claim.smooth_domain: multiplicative subgroup of F of power-of-two size

interpretation.axis9_dither: official rows have exact listed rates; no implicit dither
interpretation.coset_language: Coset-form analysis is a conservative superset of the subgroup wording unless a packet explicitly uses subgroup-only normalization.
interpretation.m_handling: fixed constant-m determinations are valid per-instance packets
interpretation.s0_zero_open: rules layer contributes no remaining open convention axis

non_claims: does not prove a safe or unsafe threshold
does not promote v13 experimental rows into Paper D
does not decide future external prize-page drift
quote_fragments: multiplicative subgroup of F whose size is a power of two
for a code C, an m, and an eps*

source.description: Arnon-Boneh-Fenzi, Open Problems in List Decoding and Correlated Agreement
